revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing the pages
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.text:

Bot: remove obsolete category Qq
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== '''[[弓矢]]'''についてのカテゴリ。[[弓 (武器)|弓]]、[[矢]]及び附属具など、主に道具に関するカテゴリとし、競技や技術に関してはサブカテゴリを参照のこと。 {{Commonscat|Bows}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:弓矢]]|version=46918916}} [[ja:Category:弓矢]]
==Old Content== #REDIRECT [[:Category:Archery equipment]]
[[ja:Category:弓矢]] [[commons:Category:Archery equipment]] [[de:Category:Bogenwaffe]] [[ko:Category:궁시]] [[mn:Category:Нумт зэвсэг]] [[su:Category:Panah]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata"
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== '''[[弓矢]]'''についてのカテゴリ。[[弓 (武器)|弓]]、[[矢]]及び附属具など、主に道具に関するカテゴリとし、競技や技術に関してはサブカテゴリを参照のこと。 {{Commonscat|Bows}} ==Local Content== {{Commonscat|Bows}} {{Commons category|Archery equipment}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:弓矢}} {{translated page|ja|Category:弓矢|version=46918916}}
[[commons:Category:Archery equipment]] [[de:Category:Bogenwaffe]] [[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]][[Ja:Category:弓矢]] [[ko:Category:궁시]] [[mn:Category:Нумт зэвсэг]] [[sn:Category:Archery equipment]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Iron arrowheads]] [[su:Category:Panah]] [[Category:Categories in Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|Q8910631}} [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:History of weapons]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Original categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]] [[Category:Weapons]] [[Category:Wikimedia commons named categories]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
revision.text:
